title: Factory v2 cutover smoke health endpoint version
narrative_md:
# Factory v2 cutover smoke – health endpoint version

## Description

Add a tiny GET /api/health-info endpoint returning {"factory_generation": "v2", "cutover_at": "2026-05-04"}.

## Tech Notes

Mirror /api/version-v2 pattern. Update docs/openapi.json. No auth.

## Acceptance Criteria

- 200 with the JSON body when called without auth
- docs/openapi.json includes /api/health-info

## Out of Scope

Authentication; metric collection

acceptance_criteria: 200 with the JSON body when called without auth
